name: Pumpkin Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Mixed Fresh or Dried Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse split peas in cold water.
2. Add the split peas to a large, heavy pot with chicken stock or water.
3. Add chopped pumpkin, onion, beef strip, salt, black pepper, mixed herbs, thyme, and parsley.
4. Simmer gently, partly covered, until peas and pumpkin are tender.
5. Season with additional salt and pepper if needed.
6. Serve hot, garnished with parsley.
6 servings.
By Lloyd Tull, Le Caribec, From The Gazette, 91/02/27.
